hero.title: Find clients who
hero.subtitle: Automatically search for businesses without websites, create personalized email campaigns and grow your freelance business.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete platform to find, contact and convert your prospects

search.title: Smart search
search.description: Search for businesses by category, city and source. Our system analyzes Google, Pages Jaunes and more to find the best prospects.
search.heading: Find the best prospects automatically
search.descriptionFull: Our advanced scraping system automatically scans Google, Pages Jaunes, Yelp and other sources to identify businesses without websites. Filter by category, city, and number of results to precisely target your market.
search.feature1: Multi-source search (Google, Pages Jaunes, Yelp, OSM)
search.feature2: Advanced filters by category and location

campaigns.title: Email campaigns
campaigns.description: Create and manage personalized email campaigns. Send in bulk with customizable templates.
campaigns.heading: Create and manage your email campaigns
campaigns.descriptionFull: Create personalized email campaigns with our WYSIWYG editor. Personalize each message with prospect information and send in bulk. Track the sending status of each email in real-time.
campaigns.feature1: WYSIWYG editor to create your templates
campaigns.feature4: Real-time tracking of sends and replies

management.title: Prospect management
management.description: Organize all your prospects in one place. Add notes, track your interactions.
management.heading: Organize all your prospects
management.descriptionFull: Centralize all your prospects in one place. Add notes, track your interactions, mark statuses and never miss an opportunity. Your prospect database is always up to date and accessible.
management.feature1: Centralized database of all your prospects
management.feature2: Notes and interactions for each prospect
management.feature4: Advanced search and filters in your database
management.allContacts: All your contacts in one place

analytics.heading: Analyze your performance
analytics.descriptionFull: Track your performance with comprehensive dashboards. Analyze your campaigns, open rates, responses and conversions. Identify what works and optimize your strategies.
analytics.feature2: Open and reply rates per campaign

credits.title: Credit system
credits.description: Buy credits and use them for your searches and email sends.

emailAccounts.title: Multiple email accounts
emailAccounts.description: Manage multiple email accounts to send from different addresses.

templates.title: Customizable templates
templates.description: Create and reuse email templates to save time.

support.title: Dedicated support
support.description: A team ready to help you succeed.

responsive.title: 100% responsive
responsive.description: Use devleadhunter on all your devices, everywhere.

security.title: Maximum security
security.description: Your data is encrypted and protected according to the strictest standards.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In 3 simple steps, find and contact your future clients

step1.title: Search for prospects
step1.description: Define your search criteria: business category, city, number of results. Our system automatically scans directories and search engines to find businesses without websites.

step2.title: Create your campaign
step2.description: Select the prospects that interest you and create a personalized email campaign. Use our templates or create your own message. Personalize each email with prospect information.

step3.title: Send and convert
step3.description: Launch your campaign and track results in real-time. Receive notifications for each response and turn your prospects into clients.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business?
cta.subtitle: Join the freelance developers using devleadhunter to find their clients and grow their business.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Buy credits as you need them. No subscription, no commitment.
pricing.creditsSubtitle: Credits are used for your searches and email sends

search.title: Prospect search
search.description: Each search costs a few credits. The more you search, the more prospects you find.

email.title: Email sending
email.description: Each email sent consumes credits. Buy additional credits anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.a1: You can buy additional credits anytime from your dashboard. Credits never expire.
faq.a2: Yes, create an account and receive free credits to test all features.
faq.a3: Credits are consumed when you search for prospects and send emails. Each action has a fixed cost in credits.

footer.description: The intelligent prospecting tool for freelance web developers. Find and contact businesses that need your expertise.
